Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.wd

Class FormulaBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.wd.FormulaBuilder
public class FormulaBuilder extends Object
Utility methods for building new formulas in the course of the computation of a WD lemma.

    • land

      public Predicate land(Predicate left, Predicate right)
      Returns the simplified conjunction of the given predicates. The simplifications made are based on the following properties:
      • BTRUE is a neutral element for conjunction
      • The conjunction operator is idempotent.
      Parameters:
      left - a predicate
      right - another predicate
      Returns:
      the simplified conjunction of the given predicates

    • land
